globalStyle: Original YjsE native pixel-art tree limbs with transparent organic silhouettes, curved growth, tapered terminals, and deliberate top-left light.

briefs.subject: Organic Forest Oak Limbs
briefs.prompt: Create an original sixteen-mask oak trunk sheet whose transparent frames connect as a softly curved trunk and readable tapered branches instead of right-angle pipes or opaque wooden squares.
requirements: Curved native-pixel strokes with tapered terminal frames
No rectangular bars, loops, full-frame fill, or raster scaling

briefs.subject: Organic Amber Living-Wood Limbs
briefs.prompt: Create an original sixteen-mask warm living-wood sheet whose transparent frames connect as softly twisting, tapered limbs instead of right-angle pipes or opaque wooden squares.
requirements: Curved native-pixel strokes with tapered terminal frames
No rectangular bars, loops, full-frame fill, or raster scaling

briefs.subject: Organic Marsh Mangrove Limbs
briefs.prompt: Create an original sixteen-mask mangrove sheet whose transparent frames connect as crooked, softly curved and tapered limbs and roots instead of right-angle pipes or opaque wooden squares.
requirements: Curved native-pixel strokes with tapered terminal frames
No rectangular bars, loops, full-frame fill, or raster scaling
